title: Festival Stage Layout: Binary Phase-Plate Spot-Array Beam Shaper
strategies: trivial: reproduce the reference random-grating superposition (uses the instance seed) -> matches the grader's baseline -> ~0.1
greedy: plain Gerchberg-Saxton/IFTA from the superposition (uniform target amplitude, no spot weighting), quantised each iteration -> mild, uneven improvement
strong: weighted GS/IFTA with adaptive per-spot weights w*=sqrt(mean/I_spot), snapping to the L device levels every round -> equalises the constellation while holding efficiency, ~2.5x the baseline
invalid: emit a wrong-shape (1x1) phase mask -> strict shape check rejects -> 0
